articles.title: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
articles.description: The explosion took place at 19:29 local time on Friday at a coal mine in northern China.

articles.title: Hot weather to intensify in UK over bank holiday weekend

articles.title: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
articles.description: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

articles.title: UK officials suggested single market for goods with Europe
articles.description: Industry figures briefed on the move said the idea has not been taken forward at this point, after EU scepticism.
